name: get_metrics
description: Fetch current metrics (cpu/mem/latency/error_rate) for a service.

name: get_logs
description: Tail recent logs for a service/pod.

name: get_events
description: List recent k8s events for a namespace/pod.

name: describe_pod
description: Describe a pod: status, restarts, last state, conditions.

name: get_deployment_status
description: Get rollout status + replica health of a deployment.

name: get_node_status
description: Get node conditions (Ready, MemoryPressure, DiskPressure).

name: query_traces
description: Query distributed traces for slow/error spans.

name: get_alerts
description: List firing alerts for a service.

name: restart_pod
description: Restart (delete) a pod so it is recreated.

name: clear_cache
description: Flush an application/CDN cache.

name: rotate_logs
description: Rotate/truncate logs to free disk.

name: scale_deployment
description: Change replica count of a deployment.

name: rollback_deployment
description: Roll a deployment back to the previous revision.

name: restart_service
description: Restart a service / all its pods.

name: increase_memory_limit
description: Raise the container memory limit/request.

name: failover_service
description: Fail traffic over to a healthy replica/region.

name: renew_certificate
description: Renew/rotate an expiring TLS certificate.

name: scale_consumers
description: Scale a queue consumer group to drain backlog.

name: drain_node
description: Cordon + drain a node (evicts workloads).

name: cordon_node
description: Mark a node unschedulable.

name: rotate_secret
description: Rotate a secret/credential.

name: modify_network_policy
description: Change a network policy / firewall rule.

name: delete_pvc
description: Delete a persistent volume claim (data loss risk).

name: end_incident
description: Declare the incident resolved and close it out.

name: escalate_to_human
description: Hand off to an on-call human with context.
